data.title: Align Partners submitted formal proposals for Coway's 37th AGM and issued third shareholder letter. Coway is a top South Korean home appliance rental platform.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, Align Partners Capital Management Inc. has filed formal shareholder proposals for the 37th Annual General Meeting of Coway Co., Ltd., a prominent home appliance rental platform in South Korea with a robust global brand and sales network. Align Partners, a shareholder of Coway, has also issued its third public shareholder letter to the Company's Board of Directors. Coway is recognized as a leader in the industry, with Netmarble emerging as its largest shareholder.

data.title: FLOKI shows 6.26% gains amidst mixed signals. RSI at 38.29 indicates oversold, while bearish MACD sets stage for potential reversal.
data.description: FLOKI is experiencing a 6.26% increase in trading, despite receiving conflicting technical signals. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 38.29, indicating oversold circumstances. At the same time, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) remains bearish, which could pave the way for a potential reversal in the near future.

data.title: TON Price Prediction: $1.65 breakout expected by March 2026. 5.29% daily gains, RSI at 53.07. Target range $1.65-$1.75 if $1.55 resistance breaks.

However, there is a downside risk that it may fall below $X.

data.title: ITRI starts Advanced Semiconductor R&D Center in Hsinchu with a 12-inch pilot line, in collaboration with Taiwan's Ministry of Economic Affairs.
data.description: The groundbreaking ceremony for the Advanced Semiconductor Research and Development Center took place in Hsinchu at the headquarters campus of the Industrial Technology Research Institute (ITRI) on February 14, 2026. The center is a collaborative project involving Taiwan's Ministry of Economic Affairs and the National Development.

data.title: Maison Battat partners with ToyCity to distribute collectibles like Laura, Mr. Pa, and Monboo in the U.S. - Feb. 14, 2026.
data.description: Maison Battat Inc., a global toy manufacturer, has revealed a new partnership with ToyCity for exclusive global distribution in the U.S. On February 14, 2026, they introduced popular collectible characters Laura, Mr. Pa, and Monboo to fans. This collaboration aims to provide these beloved toys to a wider audience.

data.title: ARK Invest reenters Coinbase with $15.2M purchase after recent selling, reversing course on $39M shares dump.
data.description: After recently selling over $39 million in Coinbase shares, Cathie Wood's ARK Invest has now purchased nearly $15.2 million worth of the stock across three ETFs. This move marks a significant reversal in strategy for the investment firm.

data.title: T.S.A. workers prepare for another shutdown not caused by them. With no funding as Congress leaves, airport security officers face uncertainty.
data.description: Amid Congress's departure without securing funding for their department, airport security officers are left questioning their future, asking themselves, "How many more opportunities will we have to protect our airports?"
